summary: Iteration 57: Mark Paid, Undo Paid, Payment History features for Pvt Trading Paddy Purchase - All 15 backend tests PASSED. All UI flows verified working correctly. Description format 'qty @ Rs.rate' confirmed in cash book entries.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend private_trading.py: mark_pvt_paddy_paid (line 430) - requires admin role, creates cash book entries when balance > 0
Backend private_trading.py: undo_pvt_paddy_paid (line 477) - resets paid_amount=0, balance=total, deletes linked payments
Backend private_trading.py: get_pvt_paddy_history (line 504) - returns payment history array with total_paid
Backend private_trading.py: _fmt_detail helper (line 17-21) - formats 'qty @ Rs.rate' with clean numbers
Frontend PrivateTrading.jsx: PaddyPurchase component has handleMarkPaid, handleUndoPaid, handleViewHistory handlers
Frontend correctly shows/hides buttons based on payment_status: Mark Paid + Payment buttons for pending, Undo button for paid
seed_data_creation: Used existing Raju entry (id: 326b1eb2-1c7d-43e5-9b0c-f20f56a63dda) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pvt Trading Mark Paid/Undo/History features are fully functional. Raju entry (50Q @ Rs.1600, total Rs.80,000) is currently in 'paid' status with balance=0. Cash book entries show correct 'qty @ Rs.rate' format in descriptions.

history_endpoint.verified: Returns payment history array and total paid amount

mark_paid_endpoint.effects: Sets payment_status='paid', balance=0, creates cash book entries if balance > 0

undo_paid_endpoint.effects: Sets payment_status='pending', paid_amount=0, balance=total_amount, deletes linked payments

ui_button_visibility.when_pending: Shows: Payment (₹), Mark Paid (✓), History, Edit, Delete
ui_button_visibility.when_paid: Shows: Undo (↶), History, Edit, Delete (no ₹ or ✓)

history_dialog.shows: Total, Paid, Status, and payment history list

cashbook_description_format.format: 'Party - Mandi - qty @ Rs.rate' e.g., 'Raju - Nanu - 50 @ Rs.1600'

party_summary_type_badge.badge: 'Pvt Paddy Purchase' shown for pvt paddy parties in Cash Book > Party Summary

pvt_trading_paddy_purchase.action_buttons: PASSED - All 5 buttons visible (₹, ✓, ↺, edit, delete) based on status
pvt_trading_paddy_purchase.raju_row: PASSED - Shows correct data: 50Q, Rs.80,000, balance=Rs.0, PAID badge

history_dialog.opens: PASSED - Opens when clicking History button (purple clock icon)
history_dialog.content: PASSED - Shows Total, Paid, Status header; 'Koi payment history nahi hai' when empty

mark_paid_flow.click: PASSED - Confirmation prompt, then marks as paid
mark_paid_flow.result: Balance becomes Rs.0, PAID badge shows, Undo button appears

undo_paid_flow.click: PASSED - Confirmation prompt, then undoes payment
undo_paid_flow.result: Balance returns to total, pending status, ₹ and ✓ buttons appear

cashbook_entries.party_type: PASSED - 'Pvt Paddy Purchase' badge for all pvt paddy entries
